events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: Lockout/Tagout, observed field condition: energy source missed (stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor). Work rough-complete. Reference OSHA 1910.147. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Missing stored energy is a serious hazard; fail. Risk high or critical? Stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor can cause unexpected energization, potential fatal. Critical maybe. Need fill fields. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. sound_source irrelevant empty? Schema says string; can use "". confidence 1.0. event_time 0.0. rate 0.0. order empty list. workable empty list. findings: e.g., "Stored energy source not isolated/relieved", "LOTO incomplete". actions: identify all energy sources, apply LOTO, verify zero energy state, etc. references: OSHA 1910.147. Need ensure valid JSON only, no markdown.
